intent: Convert the whole frontend to responsive/fluid visual sizing while preserving existing layouts.

baseline.remainingRisk: Tailwind fixed scale utilities and domain-specific layout aliases

assumptions: Current page layout, grid breakpoints, ordering, and interaction flow must remain unchanged.
Hairlines, pill radii, observer root margins, runtime pan/zoom offsets, and offscreen clipboard staging can remain fixed when documented.
Semantic tokens and clamp() are preferred over one-off arbitrary utility values.
risks: A blind global rewrite can change layout despite matching approximate dimensions.
Over-broad linting can flag non-visual numeric Tailwind utilities.
Preview and dialog domains require browser evidence because unit tests cannot prove layout preservation.
phases: Expand fluid sizing governance for Tailwind visual scale utilities.
Migrate shared shell and common components.
Migrate file list and Trash domain.
Migrate dialogs, upload, settings, and share pages.
Enable whole-frontend enforcement and capture final browser evidence.
evidence: Fixed px scan passed for all frontend source.
Tailwind visual fixed-scale scan passed for all frontend source.
Full frontend Vitest suite passed: 33 test files, 158 tests.
Frontend production build passed with existing large chunk warnings only.
Browser smoke screenshots captured for login, Trash, and Settings mobile pages with no page errors.
